title: Landing page + Signal API dashboard
acceptance_criteria: New page at /signal-api with tier comparison table (Free/Pro $49/Enterprise $199)
Each tier card has CTA button linking to Stripe Checkout
API key management section: list keys, delete keys, view usage
Usage bar showing requests used / limit
Webhook configuration section for Enterprise users
Matches existing frontend style (Tailwind, design patterns from bittensor page)
